utility_evaluation.REASONING:

3. transportation: Present and fully detailed (flight type, airline, price, currency, taxes/fees included).
4. accommodation: Present and fully detailed (name, type, nights, price, currency, child-friendliness, cancellation policy).
5. activities: Present and fully detailed (name, duration, price, currency, child-friendliness, cancellation policy).
6. additional_services: Present and fully detailed (restaurant name, cuisine, price, currency, child-friendliness, allergy accommodation).
7. total_budget: Present and fully detailed (breakdown and total in EUR).
Thus, 6 out of 7 items are fully specified.
